short_description: coredns pod is experiencing an issue on the control node. The pod maybe running, but the node may no...
close_notes:
INC Resolution

All Timestamps must be in UTC)
### Brief Summary of the issue: 
Impacted Env(s): Sao Paulo (br-sao) REGION
IPOps SME Escalated: 
Reason of escalation to Service Team:
Cause Code: is-vpc pod failures packet loss
Runbooks used to resolve: Not Needed 
Error logs:
Timeline summary of actions done: 
Resolution steps: 
Checked the pod status. All pods are running. This issue was caused due to a switch being down and NRE team is working for a fix. 

Warroom (if any): #warroom-vpc-inc10443305
